service: lambda-orchestrator

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs22.x
  region: us-east-1
  environment:
    CUSTOMERS_API_URL: http://localhost:3001
    ORDERS_API_URL: http://localhost:3002
    SERVICE_TOKEN: SUPER_SECRET_SERVICE_TOKEN

functions:
  createAndConfirmOrder:
    handler: handler.orchestrate
    events:
      - http:
          path: orchestrator/create-and-confirm-order
          method: post
          cors: true

plugins:
  - serverless-offline
